titleStmt.title: SII 41.172: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 172. (A.R. No. 390 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south wall of the central shrine of the Varadaraja perumāḷ temple at Kāvēripākkam,

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Kampana uḍaiyār, son of Vīa Bokkana uḍaiyār, Śaka 1295, Āṉaṉda, Karkaṭaka, Apara 11, Wednesday, Kāttigai = 1374 July 5.

summary.p: Part-A mentions sale of house-sites by three Brahmana indivituals. Part-Bis related to the above though continuation is broken. The village Kāvidippākkam is mentioned as a taṉiyūr (independent village).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ[pāṣaikku] tappuvarāya kaṇṭaṉ catu samutrātipati śrīpokkaṇṇa Uṭaiyār kumārar kampaṇauṭaiyārkkuc cellā niṉṟa śakābtam 1000 2 100 6 10 5ṉ mel Ānan=ta samvatsarattu rkkaṭanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa kāttikai nāḷ kāśyapagotrattu Āpastampa sūtrattu yajña kraṣṇa sarabhandharaṇi
ttevaperumāḷ karuṇākara nampiyum Aiyakkimaṇṭalapuruṣa Ulakanāta paṭṭarum Uṟuppaṭṭūr yajñamūtti paṭṭaṉ periyaperumāḷum Immūvarom grahakṣetra vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu keṅkaikoṇṭacoḻac ceri melkūṟṟil karuṇāka
l patiṉeṭṭu Aṭik kolāl kuḻi 2 1000 8 100 10 1m Ivarkku purvva svavrattiāy mallinātaṉ campuvarāyar kuṭuttu Ivar sarvamānyamāka Aṉubhavittup potukaiyileṅkaḷ kṣetrāmśattukku Inta nilaṅkaḷukku vilaiyāka viṟṟu Ivvūril taṭṭāril Eḻāyirat
ttaṭiyil tayāmukacceriyil puṉṉaikkuṇṭilukku teṟkku tevatānattukku vaṭakkum picciceṟu Uṭpaṭa taṭi Eṭṭum poṉvāriyaṉ kālukku meṟkku Ulakanāta paṭṭar kaṟketapāṭakam periyaperumāḷ kalikku pāṭakam Iraṇṭum Ākataṭi patiṉoṉṟum Itukku Uḷḷa sakala prāptikaḷum kiḻnir melnir prāptikaḷum
vatu tirumettaḷi teruvil teṉciṟakil muṭupaivaḷaiyyaḻakiyār maṉaikku teṟkkum maṉaikku paṉṉiraṭik kolāl kiḻmel Eṇkolt taraiyum teṉvaṭal kol Eṇkolum Itukku Uṭpaṭṭa paṭappaiyum Inta maṉaiyum Ittaṭi 10 1 ṉāl kuḻi Āyirattu Eṇṇūṟṟu

ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu paṭuvūr koṭṭattu taṉiyūr kāvitippākkamāṉa vikkiramacoḻac caturvedimaṅkalattu
nampi taṭi 6l kuḻi 2 100 2 10 1m Ulakanātaṉ taṭi 2ṉāl kuḻi 33 10 1kkum periyaperumāḷ paṭṭar taṭi 100 ṉāl kuḻi 5 100 6 10m Āka taṭi 10 1
nāṅkaḷ paṟṟikkoṇṭa paṇam 5 10m Ippaṇam Aimpatukkum viṟṟuk kuṭukka Inta kṣetram taṭi patiṉoṉṟukkum Ellaiāvitu
Urittākavatākavum Inta nilaṅkaḷukku Epperpaṭṭak kalaṉ Illaikalaṉuḷavāṉāl nāṅkaḷ tīttu kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum Ivarkku viṟṟu kuṭuttamaṉaikku Ellaiā
Ivaṟku dānādhanmavikrayaṅkaḷukku yogyamākatākavum viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇi kalluveṭṭi kuṭuttom dharaṇisura cakravakattikku Intamūvaruōm
Digital edition of SII 41.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
